_note: TEMPLATE — copy to <your-repo>/.claude/doc-audit.json and edit. Full schema + impact-map method: docs/ADOPTION.md (§5 schema, §6 impact map). MINIMAL viable config = anchorPath + diffGlobs + impactMap (impactMap may even start as []). This template uses the BUILT-IN GENERIC fallback layers (no docAuditCommands key). To DELEGATE to your project's own doc tools instead, add e.g. "docAuditCommands": {"format": "/review-docs", "existence": "/check-docs", "semantic": "doc-lint"}. To enforce a front-matter contract via the generic format layer, add "frontMatterFields": ["title", "description"]. For a project-boundary check, add "boundaryCommand": "make check-boundary". For a sub-directory that is NOT its own git repo, see docs/ADOPTION.md §10 (full-mode-only: omit the anchor, always run /docaudit:audit --full). Delete this _note key in real configs.
